SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDNAT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANG, KYUNG JIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WANG, QI ZHI THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF WAS OVERCHARGED, NOR THAT DEFENDANT WAS PRACTICING MEDICINE OR DISPENSING MEDICATIONS WITHOUT A LICENSE.
